sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21723" key="gehpo/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γεη-πόνος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γεη-πονικός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γεη-πονία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n21723.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γεωπ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
